svg.title: WARZONE.GG backend implementation flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart for building a Node.js + Express + Supabase backend for the WARZONE.GG tournament site MVP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up a Node.js and Express project from scratch?')
g.text: npm init · install express, cors, dotenv, @supabase/supabase-js

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What folder structure should I use for an Express API backend?')
sendPrompt('How do I create a Supabase project and set up tables for a tournament site?')
g.text: supabase.com · new project · copy URL + anon key to .env

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What SQL tables do I need for a CODM tournament website?')
g.text: users · teams · players · tournaments · matches · registrations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I migrate my data.js mock data into Supabase tables?')
g.text: Step 5 — Seed tables with MVP mock data
Migrate data.js tournaments, teams, matches into real rows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up Express routes for a REST API?')
sendPrompt('Show me Express route code for GET and POST tournaments with Supabase')
sendPrompt('Show me Express route code for team registration and approval with Supabase')
sendPrompt('Show me Express route code for matches and leaderboard with Supabase')
sendPrompt('How do I add error handling middleware and CORS to my Express API?')
g.text: Step 7 — Add CORS, error handling, input validation
express-validator · cors config for your frontend domain

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up Supabase Auth with email and password login in Express?')
g.text: Email + password signup/login · Supabase handles tokens

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I create an admin role and protect routes in Express with Supabase JWT?')
g.text: Admin role in DB · JWT middleware protects /admin routes

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I replace localStorage mock data with fetch() API calls in my HTML JS files?')
g.text: Replace data.js + localStorage with fetch() calls to Express

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I store and use a JWT token in vanilla JS for authenticated requests?')
g.text: Store JWT in memory · attach to headers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I update the admin.html page to use real API calls with admin role check?')
g.text: Check JWT role · redirect if not admin

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I test all pages of my HTML site after connecting to the backend?')
g.text: Register, bracket, leaderboard, admin flows all verified

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy a Node.js Express app to Render for free?')
sendPrompt('How do I host my static HTML Tailwind site on Netlify or Vercel?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect my Netlify frontend to my Render Express backend?')
sendPrompt('What does a fully deployed WARZONE.GG site look like in production?')
g.text: Real users · real data · real prizes
